hiring.title: Join Our Educator Network
hiring.subtitle_1: Petra Tutors is looking for thoughtful, academically strong mentors who care deeply about education and student growth.
hiring.subtitle_2: We work with international and domestic students across Japan and beyond, providing monthly learning plans, parent-visible progress, and mentorship.
hiring.subtitle_3: If you are passionate about teaching, communication, and long-term student development, we would love to hear from you.
hiring.b1_desc: Work with ambitious students pursuing IB, IELTS, international school, and overseas university pathways.
hiring.b2_desc: Teach online or in-person with flexible scheduling that works around your studies or career.
hiring.b3_desc: Go beyond homework help. Build long-term relationships and support students academically and personally.
hiring.b4_desc: Access Petra's systems, lesson frameworks, reporting tools, and educational infrastructure.
hiring.b5_desc: Join a network of tutors from leading universities including Keio, Waseda, Todai, HKU, LSE, and more.
hiring.b6_desc: Help shape a modern education platform focused on skill diagnosis, parent-visible progress, and human connection.

footer.tagline: International tutoring for ambitious students. Connecting globally minded learners with top-tier educators worldwide.
footer.address: Sakura Suite Sasazuka, 1 Chome-46-17 Honan, Suginami City, Tokyo 168-0062

home.urgency_bar: Consultation availability is limited to ensure mentor matching quality. → Begin Consultation
home.hero_title:

home.hero_subtitle:

1:1 relatable mentorship from elite mentors at
Keio PEARL, Todai PEAK, and Top Global Universities.
home.scarcity_note: Note: We maintain limited mentor availability to preserve lesson quality. Early consultation is recommended.
home.match_guarantee_body: If you don't feel a perfect connection, we re-match you for free. We stand by our results.
home.about_title: Mentors who've walked your path, guiding your shortcut.
home.about_p1: Petra Tutors exclusively consists of mentors who have firsthand experience at institutions like Keio PEARL, Todai PEAK, and HKU.
home.about_p2: We understand exactly where you'll struggle with IB/AP, why IELTS scores plateau, and how to write winning essays. We don't just teach English; we provide strategic academic support.
home.prog_lang_desc: Strategic prep for rapid score growth. (Avg. +1.0 IELTS improvement)
home.prog_lang_ex: Exams: IELTS, TOEFL, Eiken (Grade 1 to Pre-2)
home.prog_exam_desc: Internal assessments, tasks, and exam prep. Strategic support for GPA & final scores.
home.prog_intl_desc: Full support for essays, interviews, and strategy. Strategic roadmap to admission.
home.prog_intl_ex: Focus: Top universities in US, UK, Canada, Australia, Asia
home.support_1: Want to strengthen their learning in International Schools
home.support_4: Want to maintain bilingual excellence as Returnees
home.support_5: Didn't see results at traditional cram schools
home.step1_desc: Book a free trial and skill diagnosis via our 30s form.
home.step2_desc: We select a senior mentor perfectly aligned with your academic needs.
home.step3_desc: Not a match? We provide a free re-match immediately. No risks.
home.pricing_sub: No admission or monthly fees. Transparent premium pricing.
home.final_desc: Begin your journey today, or consult with us on LINE.

about.title: About Petra
about.subtitle: Make Education Human Again
about.quote_1: We want students to feel seen and respected in education, and we built this to provide it for all.
about.stage1_p1: Petra Tutors was created by those who lived the journey firsthand.
about.stage2_p1: Our founding team includes two students from Keio University. The tutors are from far and wide, from LSE to HKU. Having studied across the UK, Europe, and Japan, we navigated the exact systems our students face today.
about.stage2_p2: We understand the rigours of the IB Diploma, A-Levels, and SATs. We know the pressure of EIKEN and IELTS preparation, and the high-stakes narrative of international university admissions.
about.timeline_step1_desc: Beginning to teach independently during the COVID-19 pandemic, supporting classmates, younger students, and local families.
about.timeline_step2_desc: Over several years of tutoring and mentoring, we gradually developed the foundations of the Petra approach: mentorship-centred learning, structured progression, and building trust before performance.
about.timeline_step3_desc: The Petra system was formally brought together under Petra Tutors, with the vision of creating a more human-centred educational system for internationally minded students.
about.timeline_step4_desc: Organised as ペトラエデュケーション合同会社 (Petra Education LLC) in Japan, signalling our maturity and commitment as a formal educational institution.
about.timeline_step5_desc: Building a growing global mentor network supporting IB, returnee, bilingual, and internationally ambitious students.
about.stage3_p1: We found that something was missing…
about.stage3_p2: Modern tutoring had become increasingly transactional. Large systems focussed on rigid frameworks and standardised teaching, treating students as numbers in a curriculum rather than individuals with unique anxieties and goals.
about.stage3_p3: Even in high-achieving environments, learning often felt strangely impersonal. We realised that reaching academic milestones shouldn't come at the cost of human connection.
about.designed_subtitle: We deeply understand these educational experiences because we lived them ourselves.
about.cat_ib_desc: Support throughout the Diploma Program, IA rubrics, and the EE narrative.
about.cat_returnee_desc: Managing the transition and reintegration into new academic environments.
about.cat_bilingual_desc: Supporting those navigating multiple languages and dual-cultural identities.
about.cat_uni_desc: Students navigating overseas applications and unfamiliar university systems.
about.cat_system_desc: Supporting learners moving between British, American, and Japanese systems.
about.stage4_anchor: Students learn best when they feel understood.
about.stage4_p1: Petra was built as an alternative to the transactional model. We believe education works best when it feels human, rooted in trust, curiosity, and genuine mentorship.
about.stage4_p2: Rather than just assigning tutors; we connect students with mentors who have walked their exact path. Our goal is to guide students toward academic independence, critical thinking, and long-term confidence.
about.stage4_foundation: That is the foundation Petra was built on.
about.cta_title: Begin with a Free Trial Lesson
about.cta_desc: No commitment required. We’ll match you with a mentor who understands your exact academic path.
about.cta_trust: ✓ No admission fee  ✓ Tutor-student fit match  ✓ Flexible scheduling

no_fee.title: Transparent Pricing
no_fee.subtitle: Premium education shouldn't start with a penalty. We believe in accessible excellence.
no_fee.explanation: Many tutoring institutions and cram schools charge exorbitant admission fees between ¥10,000-¥30,000 just to enrol. Petra Tutors charges absolutely no admission fee.
no_fee.b2: Flexible lesson plans that adapt to you
no_fee.b3: Pay only for the lessons you take

team.title: Academic Leadership
team.subtitle: Meet the team driving Petra's educational philosophy and institutional strategy.
team.yutaka_desc: Co-founded Petra and leads operations, finance, and institutional growth. Oversees end-to-end business functions including revenue management, pricing strategy, and client lifecycle systems. Focused on evolving Petra from a tutor network into a structured, system-driven academic institution with measurable outcomes.
team.riku_desc: Co-founded Petra and leads the organisation as CEO and CMO. Oversees tutor recruitment from leading universities worldwide (including Keio, the University of Hong Kong, LSE, and Maastricht) and drives program design, student onboarding, and marketing strategy. Focused on building a globally connected academic network that places the right mentor with every student.
team.mannat_desc: Advises on corporate governance and international educational compliance, ensuring that Petra’s operational framework aligns with the highest global standards for academic institutions.
team.toshie_desc: Manages institutional partnerships and parent community engagement, building strong collaborative networks between Petra, international schools, and our student families.
team.shinto_desc: Oversees talent acquisition and the professional development of our global mentor network, ensuring that every educator meets Petra's rigorous standards for mentorship capability.

tutors.title: Meet Our Tutors
tutors.subtitle: A curated network of exceptional educators from top universities worldwide.
tutors.scarcity_disclaimer: We carefully match each student to ensure long-term compatibility. If this mentor is at capacity, we will connect you with a mentor of equal expertise.
tutors.and_more_desc: We have experienced tutors across dozens of other specialties not listed here. Contact us to find your perfect match.

tutor-4.name: Yutaka Takaku
tutor-4.intro: I specialize in guiding international and returnee students through the complex transitions of cross-cultural education. My teaching style focuses on building long-term academic confidence rather than short-term memorization, preparing students for rigorous university environments.
tutor-4.idealMatch: Ambitious students targeting top-tier universities who need holistic mentorship beyond just subject knowledge.
tutor-4.successCase: Mentored a returnee student from the US to successfully admit into Keio PEARL with a refined statement of purpose and interview strategy.
tutor-4.lessonStyle: Interactive and strategic, focusing on the "Why" behind the content to develop lifelong academic skills.

tutor-5.name: Riku Ishida
tutor-5.intro: Having navigated the British, Irish, and Japanese education systems, I understand the immense pressure students face. I have successfully mentored over 70 students, focusing on strategic exam preparation (IELTS, Eiken) and monthly learning plans combined with detailed student charts to trace progress.
tutor-5.idealMatch: Students feeling overwhelmed by IELTS/Eiken or international school transitions who need a compassionate and strategic coach.
tutor-5.successCase: Improved a junior high student's IELTS score from 5.5 to 7.0 in 4 months through targeted speaking and writing drills.
tutor-5.lessonStyle: Encouraging and result-oriented, breaking down large goals into manageable, high-impact milestones.

tutor-tina.name: Tina Zheng
tutor-tina.intro: Hi! I’m a second-year Economics student at Sophia University, and I tutor IB English, Economics, and essay writing. I’ve been tutoring for almost three years, working with students from young learners to high school.
tutor-tina.idealMatch: IB students or those needing rapid improvement before major exams like TOEFL or SAT.
tutor-tina.successCase: Has mentored a wide range of students from young learners to high schoolers, helping them reach key milestones through practice-focused lessons.
tutor-tina.lessonStyle: Step-by-step, practice-focused, and highly engaging/motivating, while ensuring students really understand the content.

tutor-2.name: Ronan Daly Inagaki
tutor-2.university: Eindhoven University of Technology, Mechanical Engineering
tutor-2.intro: As a mechanical engineering student in Europe, I bring an analytical and structured approach to STEM tutoring. I break down complex mathematical and scientific concepts into digestible, relatable steps, making challenging international curricula (GCSE, A-Level) highly accessible for my students.
tutor-2.idealMatch: STEM students struggling with complex GCSE/A-Level concepts who value a clear, logical, and engineering-minded approach.
tutor-2.successCase: Helping several students transition from failing grades to passing A-Level Mathematics with a focus on problem-solving frameworks.
tutor-2.lessonStyle: Logical and step-by-step, ensuring foundational understanding before moving to advanced applications.

tutor-6.name: Ulemj Batzorig
tutor-6.intro: Holding a TESOL certification, I combine professional language pedagogy with a deeply empathetic mentoring style. My goal is to guide English from a daunting hurdle into a natural tool for expression, using skill diagnosis to help students excel in TOEIC, TOEFL, and IELTS while building genuine conversational confidence.
tutor-6.idealMatch: Younger learners or students with "English anxiety" who need a supportive environment to build base confidence and testing skills.
tutor-6.successCase: Increased a student's TOEIC score by 150 points while simultaneously improving their willingness to speak up in class.
tutor-6.lessonStyle: Dynamic and communicative, using professional TESOL techniques to make learning engaging and low-stress.

tutor-hannah.name: Hannah Tuffy
tutor-hannah.intro: With an educational background in the Irish, American, and Japanese school systems, I bring a diverse and global perspective to my teaching. I teach English and Japanese with a friendly, empathetic approach. I am committed to fostering a nurturing learning environment where students of all ages can feel confident to grow.
tutor-hannah.idealMatch: Students of all ages seeking a friendly, multicultural mentor to build confidence in English or Japanese.
tutor-hannah.successCase: Worked as a self-employed Japanese tutor since 2021, successfully using skill diagnosis and monthly learning plans to guide diverse learners.
tutor-hannah.lessonStyle: Friendly and nurturing, utilizing custom modules and presentations designed around the student's monthly learning plan.

tutor-sara.name: Sara Jeshua
tutor-sara.intro: I am an international student from Indonesia studying at Keio University. I adapt the way I teach based on each individual because everyone has different strengths and weaknesses. I want my students to gain confidence in using English, both academically and in real life.
tutor-sara.idealMatch: Young learners (preschool to junior high) or anyone needing highly adaptable, individualized test prep and English foundations.
tutor-sara.successCase: Currently an English Teacher in a Language School for preschool to elementary students, and successfully taught IELTS online during high school.
tutor-sara.lessonStyle: Highly adaptable and driven by ongoing skill diagnosis, focusing on the student's unique strengths and weaknesses to build real-world confidence.

tutor-cian.name: Cian Alexander Forsyth
tutor-cian.university: The University of Hong Kong, Economics and Finance
tutor-cian.intro: Studying Economics and Finance at The University of Hong Kong, I specialize in tutoring IB subjects, English, and Mathematics. I bring a structured and relatable approach to tutoring, shaped by my extensive experience mentoring and assisting students in rigorous international curricula.
tutor-cian.idealMatch: IB students looking for a relatable peer-mentor to help navigate the rigors of math, English, and essay writing.
tutor-cian.successCase: Provided ongoing, comprehensive academic support to IB students, successfully guiding them through complex subjects like Mathematics and English.
tutor-cian.lessonStyle: Relatable and supportive, leveraging peer-level understanding to break down difficult IB concepts.

tutor-toru.name: Toru Hiiragi
tutor-toru.intro: Hi, I'm Toru! I'm a tutor based in Tokyo with experience working with students from elementary school all the way through university. I grew up in Germany for the first 15 years of my life before moving to Tokyo for high school, so I bring a genuinely international perspective to my tutoring.
tutor-toru.idealMatch: Students looking for help with math, English, or German, or those navigating complex application processes for high school or university.
tutor-toru.successCase: Successfully guided students through the process of entering Japanese high schools from abroad and applying to top-tier universities in Japan and the US.
tutor-toru.lessonStyle: Patient, encouraging, and highly adaptive to each student's individual learning style.

tutor-maegan.name: Maegan Norton
tutor-maegan.intro: My name is Maegan Norton. I mainly teach Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, and English Conversation. Having experienced both high school and university entrance exams myself, and preparing for the Common Test and National University (Science) exams, I understand the areas where students tend to stumble or find concepts difficult to grasp.
tutor-maegan.idealMatch: Science or Math students (Middle/High school) looking for someone who understands typical pitfalls and challenging concepts in the Japanese curriculum.
tutor-maegan.successCase: Successfully navigated competitive entrance exams for Hibiya High School and is currently majoring in Science and Engineering at Waseda.
tutor-maegan.lessonStyle: Supportive and empathetic, leveraging her own experience with difficult exam preparation to help students overcome specific hurdles.

tutor-michael.name: Michael MacNamara
tutor-michael.intro: Currently studying at The University of Tokyo, I tutor Economics and Mathematics at all levels with a friendly and supportive approach. My goal is to create a comfortable environment where students feel confident to learn and ask questions.
tutor-michael.idealMatch: Economics students or those looking to sharpen their mathematical and analytical skills with a friendly, high-level tutor.
tutor-michael.successCase: Has assisted students across various levels in improving their problem-solving and academic writing abilities.
tutor-michael.lessonStyle: Friendly, supportive, and focused on creating a comfortable environment for asking questions and learning.

tutor-hazel.name: Hazel (Phu Thit Wai Si)
tutor-hazel.intro: As a Burmese international student studying Liberal Arts at Sophia University, my teaching approach is diverse and global. Having experienced both Singapore and Japan's education systems, I want to provide students with a comfortable environment where they do not feel stressed about making mistakes. I have experience teaching elementary subjects, History, Biology, and English conversation to a wide range of students, from young learners to adults.
tutor-hazel.idealMatch: Students looking for conversational or academic English support, or those preparing for GCSEs with a supportive tutor who prioritizes a comfortable learning space.
tutor-hazel.successCase: Has successfully taught English conversation to adult learners in Japan and mentored students in History and Biology.
tutor-hazel.lessonStyle: Diverse, global, and guided by a monthly learning plan. Focuses on creating a stress-free environment where students aren't afraid to make mistakes.

tutor-alice.name: Alice Williams
tutor-alice.intro: Hi! My name is Alice, and I'm currently based in Tokyo taking a gap year before studying Interior Design. I have classroom experience teaching English to primary school students at the British School in Tokyo. I enjoy helping students of all levels become more comfortable with English, particularly British English, whether it's reading, writing or speaking. My teaching style is patient and friendly, as I want to make lessons as enjoyable as possible!
tutor-alice.idealMatch: Students seeking to improve their English fluency (especially British English) or those needing targeted help with GCSE/A-Levels, essays, and interviews.
tutor-alice.successCase: Has strong classroom experience teaching English to primary school students at the British School in Tokyo.
tutor-alice.lessonStyle: Patient, friendly, and highly adaptable, prioritizing the student's comfort and enjoyment to build confidence in speaking.

pricing.title: Simple & Flexible Pricing
pricing.subtitle: Discover the ideal plan for your exam-specific milestones. Start with a free trial lesson and initial skill diagnosis.
pricing.micro_copy_1: *Rates vary by subject, level, and tutor
pricing.micro_copy_2: Most students invest between ¥4,000-¥8,000 per hour
pricing.continuity_body: Consistency is key to academic growth. We offer more efficient plan designs and pricing for students committed to regular, long-term learning.
pricing.g_desc: Interactive learning. Perfect for those who want peer practice at a better rate.
pricing.dec_title: Not sure which pathway is right?
pricing.dec_subtitle: Book a free trial. We'll design a monthly learning plan and ensure a perfect tutor-student fit.
pricing.dec_l_desc: Fastest route to your goal. Focused fully on your needs.
pricing.dec_r_desc: Interactive & affordable. Great for conversational peer practice.
pricing.note_desc: The rates listed are starting estimates. Final pricing is determined based on the complexity of the subject, student level, and the specific expertise of your mentor. We believe in transparent, value-driven education.
pricing.no_fee_link: About our No Admission Fee policy →

programs.title: The Petra Learning System
programs.subtitle: Structured academic mentorship designed around long-term growth.
programs.custom_title: Don't see exactly what you need?
programs.custom_desc: We can design a monthly learning plan specifically for your exam-specific milestones.

system.philosophy_desc: Traditional tutoring focuses purely on homework help. Petra is built as a complete academic ecosystem. We combine high-level human mentorship with structured tracking to ensure confidence and long-term growth.
system.feat_1_desc: 1:1 guidance from mentors who have successfully navigated international curricula.
system.feat_2_desc: Custom learning pathways designed backwards from your ultimate academic goal.
system.feat_3_desc: Post-lesson insights and measurable progress delivered directly to your dashboard.
system.lms_title: Progress you can see and understand
system.lms_desc: Education shouldn't be a black box. Our dedicated portal gives parents and students clear visibility into lesson reports, skill progression, and upcoming academic milestones. Trust is built on transparency.
system.guidance_desc: We support our students beyond scheduled hours. From curated academic libraries to parent consultations and strategy adjustments, our team ensures your educational roadmap is constantly optimized.
system.pathways_desc: Explore how the Petra System applies to your exam-specific milestones.

inquiry.title: Free Diagnosis & Trial
inquiry.subtitle: Find the perfect monthly learning plan and tutor-student fit (takes 30s).
inquiry.q_purpose_title: Q1. What is your primary goal?
inquiry.q_grade_title: Q2. What is the student's grade level?
inquiry.name: Full Name
inquiry.subject: Main Subject of Interest
inquiry.subject_ph: Ex. IELTS, IB Math, Essay Support
inquiry.goal: Tell us about your specific milestones
inquiry.goal_ph: Briefly describe what you'd like to achieve...
inquiry.privacy_note: We only use this information to match you with the right mentor. Your privacy is our priority.
inquiry.almost_there: Almost there! You're one step away from your monthly learning plan and skill diagnosis.
inquiry.email_error: Please enter a valid email address.
inquiry.subject: Subject of Interest
inquiry.subject_ph: Ex. IB History, Business English, AP Maths
inquiry.goal_ph: Briefly describe what you want to achieve or any specific tutor preferences...
inquiry.success_desc: Thank you for reaching out to Petra Tutors. Our tutoring success team will review your inquiry and reply shortly with the next steps in our matching process.
inquiry.reassurance: We will review your inquiry and get in touch with the next steps.

popup.title: Your First Lesson is Free
popup.desc: Book a free 30-minute trial lesson with one of our international tutors. No commitment, no fees.

business.hero_title: English skills that impact your career
business.hero_sub: Meetings, emails, client interaction. Mentors with real-world experience and high-level logic accelerate your business performance in English.
business.pain_title: English is a tool to accelerate your business. We provide the strategic roadmap to mastery.
business.pain_1: Unable to speak up in meetings (timing and vocabulary gaps)
business.pain_2: Slow email writing (spending too much time finding the right words)
business.pain_3: Anxious about client interaction (lacking the nuance for high-stakes trust)
business.pain_4: Facing promotion or overseas assignment with insufficient fluency
business.pain_note: Just memorizing vocabulary isn't enough. We customize 'ready-to-use' logical structures and professional language focused on your specific role's milestones.
business.s_1_desc: Bring your actual agendas and presentation materials. We'll refine the logic and language for immediate use.
business.s_2_desc: Master communicative frameworks like PREP to project authority and presence in global professional settings.
business.s_3_desc: From nuanced word choice to persuasive structure. We teach you how to write emails that drive results.
business.s_4_desc: Our mentors are top-tier graduates with real-world experience, providing high-level feedback that understands your business context.
business.results_title: Measurable progress in weeks, not years
business.why_title: Mentors who succeed. Leading you to do the same.
business.why_sub: Our mentors aren't just teachers; they are peers who've excelled in global environments. They provide more than English-they provide the logic to succeed.
business.why_1_desc: Tutors with high-level logical thinking who understand the nuances of global corporate culture.
business.why_2_title: Your Daily Work is our Textbook
business.why_2_desc: We don't use generic materials. We solve the problems you're facing in your job right now.
business.why_3_desc: Zero initial cost. Start with a free consultation and see why professionals choose Petra.
business.t_1_quote: I was anxious about my presentation, but after mock sessions with my mentor, I delivered my best performance to date.
business.t_2_quote: I used to spend an hour on one email. Now, I have the templates and logic to finish in 15 minutes.
business.final_title: Break the ceiling of your career.
business.final_sub: Identify your professional roadblocks in a 30-minute free session. No admission fee. Immediate matching.

gateway.hero_title:
The right learning
for your goal.
gateway.hero_sub: Find your perfect academic path through relatable mentors matched for student-tutor fit and monthly learning plans.
gateway.choice_label: What would you like to achieve?
gateway.choice_ielts_label: Get results in IELTS / Eiken / TOEIC
gateway.choice_kids_label: Build English from the ground up
gateway.t_1_quote: The mentorship went far beyond standard tutoring. Navigating the IB DP felt overwhelming, but my mentor broke down the IA rubrics logically, leading to a 40+ final score.
gateway.t_2_quote: Applying to UC Berkeley required a completely different narrative. My mentor helped me find a unique academic angle that set my personal statement apart.
gateway.t_3_quote: Rather than rote memorization, the focus on critical thinking and structural writing fundamentally changed how my daughter approaches her assignments.
gateway.final_sub: Bespoke academic mentorship for international pathways.

landing_ib.hero_eyebrow: IB / AP / A-Level / SAT · ACT / Intl. School Support
landing_ib.hero_title: Master the IB & international curricula with expert mentors.
landing_ib.hero_sub: Full support for assignments, Internal Assessments, and exam prep. Mentors who've mastered the IB & international curricula guide your child to exam-specific milestones.
landing_ib.pain_title: International curricula are too complex to navigate alone.
landing_ib.pain_1: Grades are flat or GPA needs clinical improvement
landing_ib.pain_2: Assignments are too difficult for parents to assist with
landing_ib.pain_4: Struggling to keep up with the school's fast pace
landing_ib.pain_note: Success in international schools isn't just about hard work - it's about a deep understanding of the 'Assessment Criteria'. We work backwards from the rubrics to support results.
landing_ib.solution_title: Strategy-first mentoring by those who've been there.
landing_ib.s_1_desc: Expert mentors who've mastered IB, AP, A-Levels, SAT/ACT, and regional diplomas (OSSD, VCE) teach the specific logic needed to excel.
landing_ib.s_2_desc: We don't just 'do' the homework. We teach the underlying concepts and writing frameworks that lead to higher marks.
landing_ib.s_3_desc: We deconstruct the scoring rubrics for IAs, EEs, and TOK, providing strategic guidance on research and structure.
landing_ib.s_4_desc: From overcoming weak subjects to deepening interests, we construct a monthly learning plan with parent-visible progress.
landing_ib.why_title: Mentors who've walked the path and succeeded.
landing_ib.why_sub: Petra mentors are graduates of elite international programs and top global universities. They don't just teach the syllabus; they act as role models who understand the pressure and the process.
landing_ib.why_1_desc: Because they've graduated from the same programs, they know every exam trap, every IA hurdle, and exactly what markers look for.
landing_ib.why_2_desc: Our mentors from Keio, UTokyo, and top overseas universities bring high-level logical thinking and study habits to every session.
landing_ib.why_3_desc: No generic templates. We tailor every lesson to your child's specific teacher, school handouts, and current level of understanding.
landing_ib.t_1_quote: We were struggling with the IA structure, but the mentor provided clear, strategic guidance and detailed after-lesson reports that built my child's confidence and quality of work.
landing_ib.t_2_quote: My daughter was struggling with her subjects, but the mentor didn't just teach the material - they taught her how to manage her overall study plan.
landing_ib.final_title: Give your child the support they deserve.
landing_ib.final_sub: Book a free 30-minute consultation and trial lesson to find the perfect mentor match. No admission fee. Match guarantee.

landing_ielts.hero_title: Get results in IELTS, Eiken & TOEIC
landing_ielts.hero_sub: Analyze why your score is stuck and improve through the shortest route.
landing_ielts.pain_title: There's a reason why you're not improving despite your efforts.
landing_ielts.pain_note: Most score stagnation is due to approach, not effort. We identify the cause in the first session and work backwards from the solution.
landing_ielts.s_1_title: Focus only on where it counts
landing_ielts.s_1_desc: Tutors who know the test trends design the shortest route based on your score gap.
landing_ielts.s_2_title: Train in the exact test format
landing_ielts.s_2_desc: Instead of just reading textbooks, you train repeatedly in actual test formats to perform when it matters.
landing_ielts.s_3_desc: We analyze why your score is stuck in the first session. No vague improvements; we target specific weaknesses.
landing_ielts.s_4_desc: Not general English, but English for the test. We teach based on band scores and pass criteria.
landing_ielts.t_1_quote: My IELTS score went from 6.5 to 7.5 in 3 months. Petra found the cause where other schools couldn't.
landing_ielts.t_2_quote: Speaking was my weakness, but I hit 7.0 in just 2 months. The feedback was incredibly specific.
landing_ielts.why_title: Learn from those who have achieved the scores
landing_ielts.why_sub: We don't just teach methods; we teach from experience. Our tutors know what examiners want and how the test trends are moving.
landing_ielts.why_1_desc: Only tutors with IELTS 7.5+ or Eiken Grade 1. Learn from those who have conquered the test themselves.
landing_ielts.why_2_desc: We design your monthly learning plan based on an initial skill diagnosis, targeting your exact score gaps.
landing_ielts.why_3_desc: Tutors with actual test experience know how to get points and what the grading criteria really look like.
landing_ielts.final_sub: A 30-minute session to find out why your score is stuck. No admission fee. Results-oriented coaching.

landing_uni.hero_title: Get into top universities with a clear strategy.
landing_uni.hero_sub: Not just tutoring - 1:1 mentorship from students who have actually been accepted. We help you build a profile, essays, and interview performance that stand out.
landing_uni.hero_scarcity: Limited consultation slots this week: 15 remaining
landing_uni.pain_title: Top university admission is not about grades alone.
landing_uni.pain_1: Unsure how to build a strong application strategy
landing_uni.pain_2: Struggling to express your 'story' in essays
landing_uni.pain_3: Not confident in interviews or how to present yourself
landing_uni.pain_note: Strong applicants have one thing in common: a clear, well-positioned narrative. We help you build that.
landing_uni.core_value_title: We turn your experiences into a compelling application strategy.
landing_uni.core_value_sub: Not templates. Not generic advice. A structured monthly learning plan combined with detailed student charts to maximize your chances.
landing_uni.s_1_desc: We go beyond proofreading. From brainstorming to final drafts, we help you build essays with clear structure, depth, and impact. Essays reviewed by our network of current Stanford, Oxford, and Carnegie Mellon students.
landing_uni.s_2_desc: Mock interviews with real feedback. We train your logic, delivery, and presence so you perform confidently under pressure.
landing_uni.s_3_desc: We analyze your profile and target schools, then design a clear plan aligned with what top universities are actually looking for.
landing_uni.s_4_desc: Learn from students who have been accepted. Our mentors come from Stanford, Oxford, Keio PEARL, HKU, and other top programs.
landing_uni.why_title: Learn from people who've done it.
landing_uni.why_sub: We don't teach theory. We teach what actually works in real admissions.
landing_uni.why_1_desc: Our mentors cleared the same admissions bar you're aiming for. They know what works because they've done it.
landing_uni.why_2_desc: Every student gets a monthly learning plan and student chart based on their initial skill diagnosis.
landing_uni.why_3_desc: Everything we do is designed to improve your chances of admission. No fluff, no filler.
landing_uni.t_1_quote: I didn't know which experience to focus on, but my mentor helped me find a clear direction for my essay.
landing_uni.t_2_quote: The mock interviews were tougher than the real ones, so I felt calm and prepared during the actual interview.
landing_uni.final_sub: We'll help you understand your current profile, identify your strongest positioning, and build a clear application strategy. No admission fee. No pressure.

landing_kids.hero_title: It's okay to struggle with English.
landing_kids.hero_sub: We build a strong foundation, step by step, with care. Moving from 'I can't' to confidence through monthly learning plans and tutor-student fit.
landing_kids.pain_1: I dislike English or feel overwhelmed by class
landing_kids.pain_2: I can't keep up and don't know where to start
landing_kids.pain_3: I lack confidence and feel anxious about speaking
landing_kids.pain_4: Gaps in core grammar and vocabulary hindering progress
landing_kids.pain_note: English becomes enjoyable when it starts to 'make sense'. We identify exactly where you are stuck and build small wins to restore your confidence.
landing_kids.s_1_desc: Every student's barrier is unique. We conduct a skill diagnosis to design a monthly learning plan that fills in the gaps.
landing_kids.s_2_desc: We never move on until a concept is fully understood. No pressure, just patient and strategic guidance.
landing_kids.s_3_desc: Moving beyond rote memorization to true understanding. We teach the 'why' behind the rules.
landing_kids.s_4_title: Oral Practice in a Safe Space
landing_kids.s_4_desc: A supportive environment to talk and explore. Output-focused sessions that lower the barrier to communication.
landing_kids.why_title: Expert teaching with a warm heart.
landing_kids.why_sub: Our mentors aren't just high achievers; they're expert communicators who've navigated their own learning curves. They provide the support beginners need to feel safe and succeed.
landing_kids.why_1_desc: Tutors who understand the high-level pedagogy of teaching English as a second language to beginners.
landing_kids.why_2_desc: More than just teachers - they are role models who inspire and encourage students at every step.
landing_kids.why_3_desc: Start at your own pace with a free trial. No entry fees, just quality support when you need it.
landing_kids.t_1_quote: English used to be my most hated subject, but now it's my favorite. The encouragement from my mentor changed everything.
landing_kids.t_2_quote: The basics that never clicked in school are finally taking root. I feel so much more confident in class now.
landing_kids.final_sub: A 30-minute free trial with skill diagnosis. No admission fee. Move from 'I can't' to 'I can' with parent-visible progress.

landing_foundation.hero_title: Solidify your child's international school foundation early on.
landing_foundation.hero_sub: Private tutoring with monthly learning plans for IB PYP, Key Stage, and Early MYP
landing_foundation.pain_title: Are you worried about your child's future in IB or advanced studies?
landing_foundation.pain_1: Unsure if your child is truly keeping up
landing_foundation.pain_4: Concerned they'll struggle in the IB
landing_foundation.pain_note: Ignoring early academic hurdles makes catching up difficult. At Petra, we nurture the ability to 'think and understand in English' from an early stage.
landing_foundation.s_1_desc: Developing the cognitive ability to grasp concepts directly in English, rather than just translating.
landing_foundation.s_2_desc: Reinforcing what your child is currently learning, based strictly on their curriculum.
landing_foundation.s_3_desc: We guide them so they can eventually solve problems independently.
landing_foundation.s_4_desc: Building the ability to form and express opinions to reach future milestones.
landing_foundation.coverage_sub: Providing support to adapt to world-class educational systems from an early age.
landing_foundation.c_2_desc: Building solid foundations as subjects become more specialized.
landing_foundation.c_3_desc: Strengthening English and core subjects aligned with Key Stage framework.
landing_foundation.c_4_desc: Tailoring guidance to the pace of various international schools.
landing_foundation.results_title: Steady growth and peace of mind
landing_foundation.why_title: Premium early-stage support with a vision for the future
landing_foundation.why_sub: Petra's mentors are experienced individuals from top universities. As seniors who know the system inside out, they design your child's long-term growth.
landing_foundation.why_1_desc: Instructors who have conquered advanced studies act as inspiring role models.
landing_foundation.why_2_desc: Having been through IB themselves, they know exactly what's needed.
landing_foundation.why_3_desc: Cultivating independent study skills that will hold up in demanding environments.
landing_foundation.final_title: An early investment in long-term academic milestones.
landing_foundation.final_sub: Assess your child's current academic status and find the optimal support plan.

exit.title:
Before you go -
your first lesson is free.
exit.desc: We match students with elite Tokyo University, UCL, and Keio mentors. Chat with our team in 30 seconds - no commitment, no enrolment fee.
exit.p3: Matched for perfect student-tutor fit and schedule
exit.dismiss: No thanks, I'll figure it out on my own

landing.mid_cta_title: Why not start with a free consultation?
landing.mid_cta_desc: We will propose the best monthly learning plan according to your current challenges and exam-specific milestones.

seo.jsonld_desc: Petra Tutors is an online tutoring service specializing in IB, IELTS, and international university admissions.

keystone.title: The Keystone
keystone.subtitle: A digital newspaper for ambitious young minds. Write, refine, and get published.
keystone.vision_text_1: At Petra Tutors, we believe that education should go beyond exams and structured classes. We want students to find their voice, think critically about the world, and share their ideas.
keystone.vision_text_2: The Keystone is our official digital publication. It provides an exclusive opportunity for students to write academic essays, research papers, and opinion pieces under the guidance of elite editors and mentors, and have their work published for a global audience.
keystone.step1_desc: Work on a subject you are passionate about, whether it is Economics, International Relations, Literature, History, or Science.
keystone.step2_desc: Receive 1-on-1 editorial feedback from Ivy League and top-tier university mentors to polish your structure, rhetoric, and style.
keystone.step3_desc: Your final article is published on readthekeystone.com, creating a permanent academic portfolio for university admissions.
keystone.benefit1_desc: Showcase intellectual curiosity and advanced writing skills on your college applications (IB, PEARL, PEAK, Ivy League, Oxbridge).
keystone.benefit2_desc: Learn how to conduct research, formulate arguments, and edit like a college scholar under direct editor guidance.
keystone.benefit3_desc: Share your perspective with readers worldwide and join a community of ambitious student writers.
keystone.cta_desc: Whether you have a fully formed draft or just an initial idea, our mentors can guide you through the research, drafting, and publication process.
